nasb.text: Sarah denied it however, saying, “I did not laugh”; for she was afraid. And He said, “No, but you did laugh.”

esv.text: But Sarah denied it, saying, “I did not laugh,” for she was afraid. He said, “No, but you did laugh.”

cnv.text: 撒拉害怕起來，就否認，說：“我沒有笑。”但那位說：“不，你實在笑了。”

ccb.text: 撒拉听见后非常害怕，连忙否认说：“我没有笑！”但耶和华说：“不，你确实笑了。”

csbs.text: 撒拉因为害怕就否认说：“我没有笑”；但那人说：“不，你确实笑了。”
